_doc: Per-family row-count gate for the v19 TAA build pipeline. Per tmpl_gen/templates/05152026/v19_plan.txt. v19 carries v16 floors verbatim because v19_taa.txt is byte-identical to v16.txt (SHA256 843e26e4...). The build halts before train/val split if any axis is below its reject_if_below value in the post-dedup corpus. shortname_patterns are exact matches OR prefix matches (trailing '*' = prefix match).

_provenance.rationale: v19 stages 3 (TAA) and 4 (CSE) reproduce the v18.x chain bit-for-bit; only the Stage 5 (Recalibrate) interleave-probs change. Row-count gate is therefore unchanged.

axes._note: Carried from v16 verbatim. v16 manifest §3 lifts AB.TAA.{1,2,3,5} Count: 1500-2000 -> 3000 each and JS.TAA.{1,2,3} Count: 400 -> 2500 each. Per-actor cap 40 + per-primary grouping reduce post-balance actuals; floor sized to ~50% of declared. max_allowed protects against accidental Count: re-balloon.

Carried from v16 verbatim. v16 manifest §3 lifts AB.TAA.IE.{1,2} Count: 1500 -> 2500 each, AB.TAA.NEG.1 Count: 1500 -> 2500, JS.TAA.IE.1 Count: 1000 -> 2000, JS.TAA.NEG.1 Count: 500 -> 2000. Floor sized to ~70% of manifest target.
